title: ICAI Announces One-Time Relaxation for Missed UDINs: Important Update!
content:
# ICAI Announces One-Time Relaxation for Missed UDINs: Important Update!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne recently Unique Document Identification Number (UDIN) generation ke liye ek one-time relaxation announce kiya hai.

Yeh relaxation un members ke liye hai jo specific period mein documents/reports ke UDIN generate nahi kar paaye the, naye UDIN portal ke transition ki wajah se.

Here are the key details:

*   **Reason for Relaxation:** Members faced difficulties in generating UDINs due to the transition to the new UDIN portal.
*   **Applicable Documents:** This relaxation is for documents/reports signed during the period **22nd October 2025 to 22nd November 2025**.
*   **One-Time Generation Window:** Members can now generate these missed UDINs during a special window from **1st April 2026 to 30th April 2026** (both days inclusive).
*   **Normal UDIN Rule:** Iss relaxation period ke bahar ke sabhi documents/reports ke liye, UDIN generate karne ka existing rule (signing date se 60 din ke andar) continue rahega.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://udin.icai.org/announcements)

*Published on: 3 April 2026*
